name: aaronllee--easy-swap
description: Execute token swaps on-chain via OKX DEX Aggregator API (v6). Use this skill when a user wants to: 1. Build a complete swap flow: get swap calldata -> sign transaction -> broadcast to chain 2. Execute token-to-token swaps with slippage protection, MEV protection, and Jito tips (Solana) 3. Integrate OKX DEX swap + broadcast into applications, bots, or scripts This skill covers the FULL lifecycle: /swap endpoint (get tx data) + /broadcast-transaction endpoint (submit signed tx). For quote-only (no execution), use the okx-dex-quote skill instead.
